inputs.label: Annual Electricity Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total electricity used in a year, typically found on utility bills or annual energy statements.

inputs.label: Annual Natural Gas Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total natural gas consumed in a year for heating, cooking, etc., from gas utility bills.

inputs.label: Annual Car Travel
inputs.businessContext: Total miles driven per year in a typical gasoline-powered car (average fuel economy ~25 mpg).

inputs.label: Annual Air Travel
inputs.businessContext: Total distance flown per year as a passenger, including all flights (long-haul average emission factor).
